text:
swills      2011-08-14 16:21:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-POE-Component-Hailo Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
    devel/p5-POE-Component-Hailo/files patch-Makefile.PL.in 
  Log:
  POE::Component::Hailo is a POE component that provides a non-blocking wrapper
  around Hailo. It accepts the events listed under "INPUT" and emits the events
  listed under "OUTPUT".
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/POE-Component-Hailo/
  
  PR:             ports/159295
  Submitted by:   milki <milki@rescomp.berkeley.edu>

  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-POE-Component-Hailo/pkg-plist (new)
